title: Check each term separately
text: $$[vt]={LT}^{\left(-1\right)} T=L$$. $$[at**2]={LT}^{\left(-2\right)} T^2=L$$. Both terms have dimensions L, matching $$[s]=L$$.

title: Rule for addition
text: You can only add terms with the same dimensions. Since both vt and $${at}^2$$ give L, and s has dimensions L, the equation is consistent.
